REPORT.label: Legajos no asociados a un Organigrama

qry:select.name: QRY_CLASE
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG02_CLASES_ORG.oi_clase_org, ORG02_CLASES_ORG.c_clase_org, ORG02_CLASES_ORG.d_clase_org, ORG02_CLASES_ORG.c_estado FROM ORG02_CLASES_ORG WHERE ORG02_CLASES_ORG.oi_clase_org = {#PARAM:@oi_clase_org} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_EMPRESAS
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql('
SELECT ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa, ORG03_EMPRESAS.c_empresa, ORG03_EMPRESAS.d_empresa FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP join PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa INNER ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa
WHERE 1=1 {%? (#PARAMIN:@oi_empresa!='') {% AND ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa = {#PARAMIN:@oi_empresa} %} {% %} %} AND PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp IN (SELECT ORG02_ESTRUC_PERS.oi_personal_emp FROM ORG02_ESTRUC_PERS WHERE ORG02_ESTRUC_PERS.oi_clase_org = {%=#PARAMIN:@oi_clase_org%}) GROUP BY ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa, ORG03_EMPRESAS.c_empresa, ORG03_EMPRESAS.d_empresa
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_LEGAJO
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom, PER21_INDIC_ACTIVO.d_indic_activo FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL, PER21_INDIC_ACTIVO JOIN PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal INNER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal, PER21_INDIC_ACTIVO.oi_indic_activo INNER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_indic_activo WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa = {#PARAM:@oi_empresa} AND PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp NOT IN (SELECT ORG02_ESTRUC_PERS.oi_personal_emp FROM ORG02_ESTRUC_PERS WHERE ORG02_ESTRUC_PERS.oi_clase_org = {%=#PARAMIN:@oi_clase_org%}) {%? (#PARAMIN:@l_activo='1') {% AND PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_indic_activo = 1 %} {% %} %} GROUP BY PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom, PER21_INDIC_ACTIVO.d_indic_activo ORDER BY e_numero_legajo ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT NMD_SECURITY.policy FROM NMD_SECURITY WHERE NMD_SECURITY.class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.LegajoEmpresa.PERSONAL_EMP\' AND NMD_SECURITY.id={#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp} ')/ROWS/ROW
